name: Marathon Gold Corporation
description: Marathon Gold Corporation was a Canadian-based gold mining and exploration company primarily focused on the development of the Valentine Gold Project in Newfoundland and Labrador. The company was dedicated to the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral resource projects, aiming to establish the Valentine Gold Project as the largest gold mine in Atlantic Canada. In January 2024, Marathon Gold Corporation was acquired by Calibre Mining Corp. through a court-approved plan of arrangement, integrating its assets into Calibre's portfolio of gold production and exploration projects across the Americas.
